body.title: Goal: Minimize support burden through good design
body.result: palace.goals.minimize-support-burden registered; child tickets T-palace-namespace-rename + T-skills-in-repo + T-theigors-path-cleanup already shipped
body.description:
Explicit design goal: every naming inconsistency, namespace leak, or context-dependent convention is a future support question. As the repo goes public, confusing names (theigors/, .TheIgors, cc-minion jargon) generate questions Akien has to answer.

Rule: names should be self-explanatory to someone who never heard of TheIgors. If a path, namespace, or convention only makes sense with backstory, rename it.

**Affected files:** docs/TheoryOfOperation.md, palace paths, skill file comments
**Design rules:** none apply (meta-goal, not code)
**Scope boundary:** Define the principle; create child tickets for specific renames
**Completion criteria:** This goal is added to the active goals list; child tickets filed for theigors/ namespace rename and skills-in-repo
